/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libsingle_robo_custom_interface__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.so -o libsingle_robo_custom_interface__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.so CMakeFiles/single_robo_custom_interface__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_cpp/single_robo_custom_interface/msg/cluster_points__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/single_robo_custom_interface__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_cpp/single_robo_custom_interface/msg/com_with_id__type_support.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/humble/lib: /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_cpp.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/humble/lib
